comment.body:
you see, this is how desinformations spread.
this was your memory that i said bearish day.
the weekly post literally said: "risk on bursts, risk off is growing, whipsaw potential" 
not "bearish"!
this is not necessary a directional info, rather a risk management info... helps you when you decide the sizes and hedges for your trades.

always fact check yourself, before going after your memory, just to be sure
